context: Tests whether the agent builds conversion rate SQL and period-over-period TypeScript following the skill's specific join direction, CVR formula, visitor segmentation pattern, and prior-period calculation. Covers LEFT JOIN direction, ROUND/NULLIF in CVR, new/returning visitor segmentation, same-length prior period calculation, Promise.all concurrency, and null-safe change percentages.

checklist.name: LEFT JOIN direction
checklist.description: SQL query starts from sessions and uses LEFT JOIN to orders (i.e. FROM sessions LEFT JOIN orders), not the other way around

checklist.name: Cancelled orders excluded in join
checklist.description: The LEFT JOIN condition or WHERE clause excludes cancelled orders (e.g. AND o.status NOT IN ('cancelled'))

checklist.name: CVR formula with ROUND
checklist.description: Conversion rate is computed as ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT orders) / ..., 2) — includes ROUND to 2 decimal places and multiplies by 100.0

checklist.name: NULLIF in CVR denominator
checklist.description: CVR calculation wraps the session count denominator in NULLIF(..., 0) to prevent division by zero

checklist.name: New visitor segmentation
checklist.description: SQL query includes a count of new visitor sessions using a conditional expression on is_new_visitor (CASE WHEN or FILTER WHERE)

checklist.name: Returning visitor segmentation
checklist.description: SQL query includes a count of returning visitor sessions (NOT is_new_visitor or equivalent)

checklist.name: Same-length prior period
checklist.description: Prior period is computed by subtracting the period duration from currentStart (i.e. prior covers the same number of days/ms immediately before the current start)

checklist.name: Concurrent period fetch
checklist.description: Current and prior period queries are executed concurrently using Promise.all (or equivalent), not with sequential awaits

checklist.name: Null-safe change percentage
checklist.description: Percentage change values are returned as null (not NaN, 0, or an error) when the prior period has no sessions or orders

checklist.name: Period-over-period for all KPIs
checklist.description: The TypeScript function returns change percentages for at least three distinct metrics (e.g. sessions, orders/CVR, and new visitor count) — not just a single aggregate
